{{CargoRelic
|name=Jack's Magic Bean
|class_id=20403
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=This magic bean can grow into a stalk that reaches the cloud. If you're fit enough, you can climb up to a giant's castle, wherein is a hen that lays golden eggs. So far, however, only a young boy named Jack has ever made it there.
|fame=27
|art=12
|fth=20
|civ=16
|tech=15
|ss1=Per 10 FAME-Fungi eaten, Snail ATK +1<br>FAME-Fungi Eaten: 500/500
|ss2=Per 10 FAME-Fungi eaten, Snail ATK +2<br>FAME-Fungi Eaten: 500/500
|ss3=Per 10 FAME-Fungi eaten, Snail ATK +3<br>FAME-Fungi Eaten: 500/500
|ss4=Per 10 FAME-Fungi eaten, Snail ATK +3<br>FAME-Fungi Eaten: 500/500
|ss7=Per 10 FAME-Fungi eaten, Snail ATK +3<br>FAME-Fungi Eaten: 500/500<br> (Awakened)
}}
